query:
-- Get the enrollment IDs we just created
SELECT id, customerName, beltAchievedDate FROM enrollments WHERE customerEmail LIKE '%@test.com' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 6;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user aYsLc9eZnrL9DEu.7de40140e08f --database Lu5Er8YqGDyrsXYnbeua3C --execute -- Get the enrollment IDs we just created
SELECT id, customerName, beltAchievedDate FROM enrollments WHERE customerEmail LIKE '%@test.com' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 6;
